summary: Single Reserved6 long entry with one supported filter (taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.55); no integrity issues, low concentration risk given sparse R6 trigger baseline.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: Sole novel_dim is taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.55, a trailing 5-minute window evaluated at T0; no forward_/post_event_/confirm_after_ semantics. Field is in SUPPORTED_FIELDS per R1 fix.
risk_assessments.multitest_inflation_notes: Reserved6 channel is sparsely populated (35 entries vs 61 OI_Price, 60 pricechange) and this proposal uses a single threshold not heavily reused across the 523-archetype family; marginal FWER contribution.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump long operates on OI_Price channel; this proposal targets Reserved6/long, so symbol-level same-side stacking is possible but channel-disjoint. Paper-shadow only — monitoring item, not a blocker.
risk_assessments.remediation: None required. Recommend paper-shadow tracking for any symbol-level co-trigger with the live OI_Price pump-long strategy as a monitoring item only.
